name: 7'x10' High Low Grid Area Rug Taupe/Cream/Gray - Threshold™
description:
Spruce up your space with functional elegance with this High-Low Grid Area Rug from Threshold™. Featuring a grid pattern in gray for a versatile and stylish look, this rectangular handmade rug blends seamlessly with just about any existing décor. The woven polyester-blend material provides soft comfort underfoot, while latex-blend backing helps keep it in place.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
